## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🤔 Expected Behavior
<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->

## 😯 Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened? Include error messages, screenshots, or logs if applicable -->

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem -->

## 💻 Environment
**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 122, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]

**Orchestratorr Setup:**
- **Backend Running:** [Yes/No]
- **Frontend Running:** [Yes/No]
- **Services Configured:** [e.g., Radarr only, Radarr+Sonarr]
- **Access Method:** [Localhost, Network IP, Reverse Proxy]

## 🔧 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues before creating this one
- [ ] I have provided all relevant environment information
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have described both expected and actual behavior
